build.description: Build a workspace for production (Vite/Astro/Worker bundle) after its dependencies are built

build:staging.description: Build a workspace with staging environment configuration

lint.description: Run Biome lint checks on a workspace without modifying files

lint:fix.description: Run Biome and auto-fix lint/format issues (not cached, mutates source)

type-check.description: Type-check a workspace with tsc after its dependencies are built

test.description: Run the workspace's unit/component tests and emit coverage

dev.description: Start a workspace's dev server (persistent, never cached)
